name: Rodrigo Tekstil Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Rodrigo Tekstil Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. provides apparel for men and women; footwear, and accessories for men in Turkey. Its apparel products include T-shirts, polo shirts, shirts, sweats, sweaters, knit wares, jeans trousers, trousers, tracksuits, jackets, raincoats, coats, vests, blouse, skirt, tights, dresses, shorts, bags, and track suits. The company also offers casual and sports shoes; and accessories, including boxers, wallets, belts, socks, bags, shorts, and perfumes. It also operates retail stores, as well as sells online. The company was formerly known as Rodrigo Tekstil Turizm Insaat Gida Ticaret ve Sanayi Anonim Sirketi and changed its name to Rodrigo Tekstil Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. in July 2012. Rodrigo Tekstil Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1993 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.
